title: Debug and fix app functionality issues

requirements.summary: Investigate and fix runtime errors, authentication flow issues, data fetching failures, and component rendering problems preventing proper app functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays correctly for authenticated users

file_operations.description: Review and fix actor initialization logic, ensure proper error handling for canister communication failures, verify agent configuration is correct, and add defensive checks for actor availability. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Fix query hooks to ensure proper dependency on actor availability, add error boundaries for failed queries, ensure queries are only enabled when actor is ready, and prevent queries from running before authentication completes.

Review authentication flow for edge cases, ensure identity persistence works correctly across page refreshes, add proper error handling for authentication failures, and verify logout clears all authentication state properly. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add loading states for all data dependencies, ensure proper error handling when profile or jobs data fails to load, verify profile completion check works correctly, and add fallback UI for missing data.

Review router configuration for any missing error boundaries, ensure all routes are properly configured with correct paths, verify QueryClientProvider has appropriate error handling configuration, and add global error boundary for uncaught errors.

requirements.summary: Verify Internet Identity authentication integration works correctly with proper login/logout functionality and session persistence
acceptanceCriteria: Login button triggers Internet Identity authentication flow
User identity is persisted correctly after login
Logout clears user session and redirects appropriately
useInternetIdentity hook returns correct authentication state

file_operations.description: Fix login/logout flow to handle all edge cases including already authenticated users, add proper loading state feedback during authentication, ensure query cache is cleared completely on logout, and verify disabled state prevents multiple simultaneous login attempts.

Ensure login function properly handles authentication state transitions, verify identity persistence works across browser refreshes, fix any race conditions in authentication state updates, and ensure clear function completely resets authentication state. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Verify InternetIdentityProvider is configured correctly with proper initialization options, ensure provider wraps the entire application tree correctly, and check that authentication state is available to all child components.

requirements.summary: Fix broken routing and navigation issues to ensure all pages are accessible and navigation works correctly
acceptanceCriteria: All routes in App.tsx resolve correctly
Navigation between pages works without errors

file_operations.description: Review all route configurations for correct path definitions, ensure route parameters are defined correctly, verify lazy-loaded components are imported properly, and check that navigation guards work correctly for protected routes.

Fix navigation links to use correct routing mechanism, ensure navigation buttons properly handle authentication state, verify admin panel link only shows for admin users, and ensure all navigation triggers work without errors.

Verify URL parameter parsing for job ID works correctly, ensure navigation from job cards passes correct parameters, add error handling for invalid or missing job IDs, and verify back navigation works properly.

Fix multi-step navigation flow to properly handle URL parameters, ensure job ID is correctly extracted and passed through all steps, verify success page navigation works correctly, and add proper error handling for navigation failures.

requirements.summary: Validate React Query hooks are properly configured to prevent infinite loops, ensure query invalidation works correctly, and fix stale data issues
acceptanceCriteria: Loading and error states display appropriately

file_operations.description: Review all query hooks for proper enabled conditions to prevent premature execution, ensure query keys are stable and don't cause unnecessary refetches, verify retry logic is appropriate for each query type, and add proper error handling for all queries.

Fix profile query to properly handle actor dependency with correct enabled condition, ensure mutations properly invalidate related queries, verify profile completion calculation doesn't trigger unnecessary refetches, and ensure custom loading state prevents flashing.

Fix combined query dependencies to prevent cascade refetching, ensure eligibility filtering doesn't cause performance issues, verify all dependent queries have stable keys, and add proper loading state aggregation.

Ensure application mutation properly invalidates job postings and applications queries, verify success/error callbacks don't cause query conflicts, and add proper optimistic updates where appropriate.

Fix all admin mutations to properly invalidate related queries after success, ensure mutation callbacks don't trigger infinite refetches, verify toast notifications don't interfere with query updates, and add proper error handling for all operations.

requirements.summary: Check and fix TypeScript compilation errors and type mismatches that may cause runtime failures
acceptanceCriteria: No TypeScript errors in build output
Type definitions match actual data structures

file_operations.description: Review all type definitions to match backend interface types, ensure UserProfile and StudentProfile types are used correctly, fix any type mismatches in query return types, and remove any 'any' types that might hide errors.

Verify all query function return types match expected types from backend interface, ensure proper typing for Option types and null handling, fix any implicit any types in query results, and verify Principal types are imported and used correctly.

Ensure JobPosting type matches backend interface definition, verify all property accesses use correct optional chaining for nullable fields, fix any type mismatches in props or local variables, and ensure logoUrl optional field is handled correctly.

Verify eligibility calculation uses correct types from backend interface, ensure CGPA comparison uses proper number types, fix any type issues with array comparisons for branches and skills, and verify StudentProfile type properties are accessed correctly.

Review all type definitions for state variables, ensure filter logic uses correct types for comparison, verify useStudentDashboard hook return types are properly typed, and fix any type mismatches in component props.

Verify admin operations hooks are typed correctly, ensure tab component props match expected types, fix any type issues with conditional rendering based on user role, and verify all imported types match usage.
